function: async () => { await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const dot = document.querySelector('[data-cursor-dot]'); dot.style.transform = 'translate3d(450px, 400px, 0)'; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 100)); const rect = dot.getBoundingClientRect(); const cx = Math.round(rect.x + rect.width/2); const cy = Math.round(rect.y + rect.height/2); const top = document.elementFromPoint(cx, cy); const loader = document.querySelector('.loader'); return { rect: { x: rect.x, y: rect.y }, loaderClass: loader.className, loaderVisible: getComputedStyle(loader).visibility, loaderOpacity: getComputedStyle(loader).opacity, top: top ? top.tagName + '.' + (typeof top.className === 'string' ? top.className.slice(0, 40) : '') : null, isDotTop: top === dot }; }
